groups.title: Parts of the hotel
groups.question_title: What problem does Mona point out about each part of the hotel where she interned?
groups.desc:
Questions 21-26
What problem does Mona point out about each part of the hotel where she interned?
Write the correct letter, A-F, next to Questions 21-26.

Questions 27-30
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: How does the experience benefit Mona?

options.title: A
options.content: It is good for her future job.

options.title: B
options.content: It is good for her dissertation.

options.title: C
options.content: It can let her know something about the specific job.

questions.title: Why does the tutor want Mona to do the presentation?

options.title: A
options.content: Because she can do it skilfully.

options.title: B
options.content: Because she wants to do it herself.

options.title: C
options.content: Because she can show other students how to do a presentation.

questions.title: What does Mona suggest Tom do?

options.title: A
options.content: talk to the university's career centre

questions.title: What is Tom's plan for his own essay?

options.title: A
options.content: to study about the rise of five-star hotels

options.title: C
options.content: to do research into how the hotel industry works
